metadata.title: ScoreLead - AI-Powered Lead Discovery & Scoring
metadata.description: Discover, score, and convert B2B leads with AI. Automated discovery, intelligent scoring, and personalized outreach at scale.

hero.heading: Discover, score, and convert your next best customers
hero.subtitle: ScoreLead uses AI to find and qualify businesses, enrich them with detailed data, score their potential, and generate personalized outreach automatically.

customerStory.label: Customer story
customerStory.heading: See how Ceramik grew their pipeline 10x
customerStory.quote: ScoreLead transformed how we find and reach pottery studios. We went from manually searching for leads to discovering hundreds of qualified prospects in minutes. Our pipeline grew 10x in the first month.
customerStory.companyDesc: All-in-one app for pottery teachers to manage their studios
customerStory.stat2Label: Pipeline growth in the first month
customerStory.stat3Label: Less time spent on manual research

features.heading: Built for teams that need more pipeline
features.description: ScoreLead combines discovery, enrichment, and outreach into one system. Stop juggling spreadsheets and manual research - let AI handle the heavy lifting.

ai.label: Artificial intelligence
ai.heading: AI that does the research for you
ai.description: ScoreLead AI. Point it at any city or industry, and it discovers businesses, visits their websites, extracts structured data - emails, pricing, services, team members, social profiles - and scores every lead automatically.
ai.scoringDesc: Our AI analyzes every lead across multiple dimensions - online presence, reputation, market fit, engagement potential, and readiness to buy - then distills it into one clear score.
ai.outreachDesc: AI generates personalized multi-step outreach sequences in multiple languages. Each message references the lead's specific business details.
ai.outreachStep1Subject: Loved what I saw at Sunset Yoga Studio
ai.outreachStep1Body: Hi, I noticed your studio offers yoga, pilates, and meditation classes in SF...
ai.outreachStep2Body: Just wanted to share how studios like yours are saving 10+ hours/week...
ai.outreachStep3Subject: Your 128 five-star reviews say it all
ai.outreachStep3Body: With your 4.7 rating and growing waitlist, here's how we can help scale...
ai.subject: Subject:

pipeline.label: Workflow and pipeline
pipeline.heading: From discovery to conversion
pipeline.description: Visualize your entire pipeline. Track every lead from first discovery through enrichment, scoring, outreach, and conversion - all in one place.
pipeline.discoveryDesc: Launch async discovery jobs by country, state, or city. Track progress in real time as ScoreLead scans multiple data sources across the web.
pipeline.deduplicationDesc: Smart identity matching ensures no duplicate leads. Our AI cross-references multiple data points to merge duplicates automatically.
pipeline.feature1Desc: Async discovery by geography with progress tracking.
pipeline.feature2Desc: Intelligent scoring across multiple dimensions to prioritize the best leads.
pipeline.feature3Desc: Export filtered leads with all enriched data.
pipeline.feature4Desc: AI outreach in multiple languages to reach leads anywhere in the world.

dashboard.enrichmentCompleted: AI enrichment completed - 14 data points extracted
dashboard.discoveredVia: Discovered via AI search - San Francisco, CA

waitlist.heading: Be the first to try ScoreLead
waitlist.description: Join the waitlist and get early access when we launch.
waitlist.success: You're on the list. We'll be in touch.
waitlist.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

capabilities.label: Capabilities
capabilities.heading: Everything you need in one platform
capabilities.description: ScoreLead combines AI-powered discovery, enrichment, scoring, outreach, and export into a single platform - so your team can focus on closing deals.
capabilities.card1Title: Find businesses across any city or industry automatically
capabilities.card2Title: Search and index business websites at scale
capabilities.card3Title: Extract structured data from any business website
capabilities.card4Title: Turn raw data into actionable lead intelligence
capabilities.card5Title: Export enriched leads to CSV with all data points
capabilities.card7Title: Build custom integrations with the ScoreLead API

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again or return to the home page.

notFound.title: This page could not be found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist, has been removed, or the URL might be incorrect.
